sourcePrompt: A ZIL-157 six-wheel cargo truck, the NVA supply hauler of the Ho Chi Minh Trail, about six and a half meters long. A rounded 1950s Soviet cab with bulbous fenders, a split flat windshield and a wide louvered grille; behind it a long wooden-sided cargo bed under canvas-topped bows. Three axles on big single tires - one forward. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
handEdit: Kiln war-export-plan 2026-06-25; grade C; generation bfda82b5-1551-4238-ba83-f47aa7aad62a
